name: Iced Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sugar or low calorie sweetener
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the instant coffee and sugar in hot water.
2. Stir in 1 liter of cold milk.
3. Add ice.
For a mocha flavor, use chocolate milk and reduce the sugar to taste.
For a single serving: dissolve 1 tablespoon of instant coffee
and 2 teaspoons of sugar in 1 tablespoon of hot water.
Add 1 cup of cold milk and stir.
